lines.speaker: Introduction
lines.japanese: Welcome to Marugoto: Japanese Language and Culture, a comprehensive series of

lines.speaker: coursebooks
lines.japanese: for adult learners of Japanese as a foreign language developed by the Japan

lines.speaker: Foundation
lines.japanese: and based on the JF Standard for Japanese Language Education.

lines.speaker: The
lines.japanese: Japan Foundation engages in a variety of cultural exchange initiatives aimed at

lines.speaker: deepening
lines.japanese: understanding of Japan overseas and promoting mutual understanding between

lines.speaker: Japan
lines.japanese: and other countries. We think it is important that our work, including our work in

lines.speaker: Japanese
lines.japanese: language education, takes place in a way that encourages mutual understanding

lines.speaker: between
lines.japanese: people in situations where international cultural exchange takes place, and

lines.speaker: Marugoto
lines.japanese: Japanese Language and Culture is based on this way of thinking.

lines.speaker: the

lines.speaker: communication

lines.speaker: variety

lines.speaker: illustrations

lines.speaker: including

lines.speaker: management

lines.speaker: the
